expectations.text: [holdout_regression][blocking] Case focus is explicitly covered: skill improvements for report-editor do not regress a different feature planning flow
expectations.evidence: result.md explicitly states the case focus and evaluates cross-feature non-regression: "This case verifies that skill improvements for the `report-editor` feature family do not regress a different feature planning flow" and under "Cross-feature non-regression focus: Covered" it explains the fixture compares a report-editor-focused plan vs an embedding/migration-shell/regression-focused plan and that the orchestrator should support both without collapsing the other flow.

expectations.text: [holdout_regression][blocking] Output aligns with primary phase holdout
expectations.evidence: result.md declares "Primary phase under test: holdout" and confirms holdout behavior: "This output intentionally stays at a holdout checkpoint level: It does not attempt to run phases, generate drafts, or produce `qa_plan_final.md`. It limits itself to evaluating ... using only the provided evidence." execution_notes.md also confirms: "No attempt was made to generate or validate runtime artifacts ... since this benchmark is a holdout checkpoint."
